ddls:
CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's photo */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the person (e.g., director) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the writer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the writer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the writer's photo */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the person (e.g., writer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the producer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the producer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the producer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the producer's photo */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the person (e.g., producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_finances" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the film */,
  "gross_revenue" REAL /* Gross revenue of the film */,
  "cumulative_revenue" REAL /* Cumulative revenue of the film */,
  "marketing_budget" REAL /* Marketing budget of the film */,
  "distribution_budget" REAL /* Distribution budget of the film */,
  "total_expenses" REAL /* Total expenses of the film */,
  "na_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from North America */,
  "eu_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from Europe */,
  "asia_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from Asia */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_certifications" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "g_certificate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has a G certificate */,
  "pg_certificate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has a PG certificate */,
  "pg13_certificate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has a PG-13 certificate */,
  "r_certificate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has an R certificate */,
  "unrated_certificate" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film has an Unrated certificate */,
  "certification_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the certification */,
  "certification_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the certification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_productions" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "bbc_films" INTEGER /* Indicates if BBC Films is involved in production */,
  "columbia_pictures" INTEGER /* Indicates if Columbia Pictures is involved in production */,
  "dimension_films" INTEGER /* Indicates if Dimension Films is involved in production */,
  "dreamworks" INTEGER /* Indicates if DreamWorks is involved in production */,
  "fox_searchlight_pictures" INTEGER /* Indicates if Fox Searchlight Pictures is involved in production */,
  "lionsgate" INTEGER /* Indicates if Lionsgate is involved in production */,
  "millennium_films" INTEGER /* Indicates if Millennium Films is involved in production */,
  "new_line_cinema" INTEGER /* Indicates if New Line Cinema is involved in production */,
  "paramount_pictures" INTEGER /* Indicates if Paramount Pictures is involved in production */,
  "screen_gems" INTEGER /* Indicates if Screen Gems is involved in production */,
  "summit_entertainment" INTEGER /* Indicates if Summit Entertainment is involved in production */,
  "twentieth_century_fox" INTEGER /* Indicates if Twentieth Century Fox is involved in production */,
  "universal_pictures" INTEGER /* Indicates if Universal Pictures is involved in production */,
  "walt_disney_pictures" INTEGER /* Indicates if Walt Disney Pictures is involved in production */,
  "other_production_companies" INTEGER /* Indicates if other production companies are involved */,
  "company_country" TEXT /* Country of the production company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the production company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "nominated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film was nominated for an award */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Indicates if the film won an award */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the award or nomination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the award or nomination */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Ceremony where the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, writer, marketing) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team of the user */,
  "profile_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the film */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genre_map" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast_and_crew" (
  "cast_crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast or crew member */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the person (e.g., actor, cinematographer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_cast_and_crew_person_id FOREIGN KEY ("person_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_marketing" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the campaign */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Reach of the campaign (number of people reached) */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the campaign */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., ticket sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution agreement */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of distribution (e.g., cinema, streaming) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the distribution */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the distribution */,
  "territory" TEXT /* Territory of the distribution */,
  "revenue_share" REAL /* Revenue share percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_distribution_distributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("distributor_id") REFERENCES distributors ("distributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distributors" (
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distributor */,
  "distributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the distributor */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the distributor */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Email of the distributor's company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distributor_id")
)
